TAMAZIA · INSIGHTS · HEALTHCARE AND MEDICAL

Healthcare and Medical

Private clinics, surgeons, dentists and medical groups.

MHRA · HIPAA · CQC · ASA

In preparation

These slots are reserved with working titles. Each will be researched, drafted, and published over the coming weeks.

In preparation HIPAA + E-E-A-T

HIPAA + E-E-A-T: The Two Frameworks Every US Medical Site Breaches Simultaneously

The compliance Venn diagram for US private medical sites in 2026.

In preparation MHRA HMR 2012

MHRA Human Medicines Regulations 2012: A Copy Audit Checklist for Private Clinics

Health-claim compliance checklist for UK private clinic websites.

In preparation ASA CAP Section 12

Cosmetic Surgery SEO in the UK: Where ASA Rules Stop You Ranking Legally

The cosmetic-procedure advertising landscape since the 2024 ASA reforms.

In preparation CQC Framework

CQC Inspection Readiness and Your Website: What Actually Gets Scored

How your patient-facing website surfaces in CQC inspector reviews.

In preparation Cross-jurisdiction

Before/After Gallery Compliance: UK, US, UAE Rules Side by Side

Patient-image compliance map across three regulatory regimes.

In preparation Hreflang · MOHAP

Medical Tourism SEO: Source-Market Intent and Destination Authority

Capturing UK + GCC patient flows for UAE/India destination clinics.

In preparation ASA CAP · MHRA

Patient-Journey Content That Converts Without Breaching Advertising Standards

Converting patient-funnel content within the regulator boundary.

In preparation Google E-E-A-T

E-E-A-T for Medical Sites: The Author Box That Passes Google's Review

GMC-registered author markup that satisfies the Quality Rater.

In preparation BACP · NICE

Mental Health Content Online: Where Duty of Care and Ranking Collide

Therapy-practice content liability and SEO at the same time.

In preparation CQC · GMC · ASA

Private GP SEO in London: The 2026 Competitive Landscape

The London private-GP search market mapped, with displacement opportunities.

International SEO for regulated enterprises.
